title: prunus persica f. alba
intro: Prunus persica f. alba, also known as the White Peach, is a variety of peach tree that is native to China and is known for its white flowers and sweet, white fruit. The medicinal properties of Prunus persica f. alba include its ability to treat digestive issues, inflammation, and fever, due to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The health benefits of consuming Prunus persica f. alba include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and provide anti-cancer properties. Prunus persica f. alba can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the bark, leaves, or fruit in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
